data.title: Radio Flyer Mini Classic Red Wagon for Kids, 16.5" Toy Wagon for Kids Aged 1.5+, Play-Size Version of the Classic, Durable Wh

features: MINI CLASSIC WAGON: A kid-sized version of the iconic red wagon
the Radio Flyer Mini Classic Wagon for toddlers is designed for imaginative play
hauling small toys
and everyday fun.
CLASSIC DETAILS: Features a seamless steel body
durable molded wheels
and a real working handle-designed to mirror the look and feel of the iconic Radio Flyer wagon.
PLAYTIME FAVORITE: This toddler wagon is ideal for carrying dolls
stuffed animals
blocks
and tiny treasures
encouraging open-ended play indoors or outdoors. Recommended for kids ages 1.5+.
CREATIVE USES: Also loved as a gift basket base
party decoration
or seasonal display
this toy wagon is a playful piece that grows beyond playtime. Body Dimensions: 16.5" L x 7.5" W.
BELOVED ICON OF PLAY: For over a century
Radio Flyer has inspired joyful play with wagons
trikes
and more. As a Certified B Corp
we create lasting products that spark imagination while caring for future generations.
